examples: However, this is a contentious theory and such claims have been treated skeptically by some scholars based on their reading of the relevant data.
The other two magi (and their camels) eye him skeptically.
Initially viewed skeptically by sporting and educational officials in China, it is now spreading widely.
Advertisements in newspapers seeking secretaries and clerks and leads for musical productions were best read skeptically.
Their cries will be heard skeptically, given their part in the latest overleveraging episode.
